name: spot-core
description: MCP manifest exposing Spot-Core tools with dangerous operations disabled.

tools.name: spot_route
tools.description: Get routing table and worker assignment logic.

tools.name: spot_fleet
tools.description: Ping all workers and return fleet health.

tools.name: spot_validate
tools.description: Validate commands against Spot governance rules.

tools.name: spot_read
tools.description: Read a file from a worker.

tools.name: spot_write
tools.description: Write a file to a worker. DISABLED for safety.

tools.name: spot_restart
tools.description: Restart a worker service. DISABLED for safety.

tools.name: spot_quarantine
tools.description: Quarantine a worker. DISABLED for safety.

tools.name: spot_release
tools.description: Release a quarantined worker. DISABLED for safety.
